headline: Medtronic plc (MDT): Innovation Pipeline and Structural Changes Support the Bull Case
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is one of the undervalued large cap stocks to buy. On April 6, Argus Research analyst David Toung cut his price target on Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) to $115 from $125 and maintained a Buy rating. Toung’s bullishness on the stock despite the target cut stems from Medtronic’s structural transformation. This is in […]
